title: CMC-241 New Female Boss The Collapse of Magical Touch Mihina - Mihina (Azumi Hina, Nagai Mihina)
description: Ambitious and talented career W Mihina is headhunted by the sales department of a food trading company and is assigned as a new section chief. However, there was a department of only men who had an unspeakable antipathy to the female boss and concealed an abnormal habit ... The subordinates approached Mihina in the shadow and invited him to the invisible toilet warehouse and finally bullied. Was restrained and in turn satisfied the beast's desire. However, the seemingly arrogant Mihina is so shameful that the blood of a masochist female who has been holding back for many years boils.
